title: Why Claude? An Honest Look at AI Platforms
subtitle: Picking an AI platform is a foundation decision for your personal operating system. Claude prioritizes persistent context, not just chat responses.

sections.content: Choosing an AI platform is like choosing your operating system, not your favorite app. You build everything on top of it. Switching later costs time, context, and momentum. Claude is the best foundation because it treats every conversation as part of a larger system you are building over time.

cards.title: Persistent Context
cards.desc: Projects, memory, and custom instructions that carry across every conversation. No more re-explaining who you are.

cards.title: Long-Form Thinking
cards.desc: Handles complex reasoning, long documents, and nuanced tasks where quick answers are not enough.

cards.title: Extensibility
cards.desc: Connectors, plugins, MCPs, and Code mode. Claude grows with your skill level instead of boxing you in.

left.title: Claude as Your OS
left.desc: You build workflows, store context, and extend capabilities over time. Every session adds value to the next one.

right.title: AI as a Search Bar
right.desc: You ask one-off questions. Every conversation starts from scratch. No compounding value over time.

sections.text: "The best AI platform is the one you build on top of. Claude is designed for that."
